title: The Character of the Meeting [to Confront 'Uthman] and [the Day of] al-Jara'ah
description: and [the Day of] a]-jara'ah232 It was transmitted to me in writing by al-Sari-Shu'ayb-Sayfal-Mustanir b. Yazid-Qays b. Yazid al -Nakha'i: When Mu'awi231. See above, p. 71 (text, I, 2865).

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
